rationale: A generic model review note can be useful if it points reviewers at the extreme guaranteed weight-loss claim.
A generic model review note can be useful if it catches the health-adjacent form plus third-party tracking context.
Safe wellness routine copy should not receive generic model review burden.
Financial-services claims can merit generic human review when the model is not mapping to a precise YAML policy id.
Neutral SaaS workflow copy should not receive generic model review burden.
